metric: val_loss (negative log-likelihood, StudentT; not comparable to LSTM MAE or TFT quantile loss)
notes: 10 epochs total (0–9). Early stopped at end of epoch 9 (5 consecutive non-improving epochs since epoch 4 best). PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1 required: aten::_standard_gamma not implemented for MPS; gamma sampling falls back to CPU while rest of forward pass runs on MPS. W&B not used (incompatible wandb version in venv_deepar; console logging only).
